description: Style Note Crafted from leatherette and designed with loads of organiser space, this clutch from hidekraft makes for a perfect addition to your handbag. Product Description Black clutch with a flap and press button closure Two main compartments, three card slots, one id card holder, one insert pocket and a zippered pocket An insert pocket at the back  Branding embossed on the front Leatherette flower applique on the front for style Material and Care Leatherette Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust  Size Height: 9 cm Width: 18 cm
